summary: Backend testing completed for P0 Critical Bug Fix - PRC Balance Reset Bug. All 6 new/modified APIs working correctly. The core fix (line 4586) properly checks BOTH membership_type AND subscription_plan before resetting PRC.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Login PRC check (line 4586): Now checks BOTH membership_type='free' AND subscription_plan not in paid_plans - protects paid users
✅ Auto-fix during login (lines 4593-4600): Automatically fixes membership_type to 'vip' when paid plan detected with free membership_type
✅ Diagnose API (/api/admin/user/{uid}/diagnose): Correctly detects 'Membership Type Mismatch' as CRITICAL issue
✅ Fix Issue API (/api/admin/user/{uid}/fix-issue): fix_membership_type action works correctly
✅ PRC Affected Users API (/api/admin/prc-affected-users): Lists users with paid plan + 0 balance + transaction history
✅ Restore PRC API (/api/admin/restore-prc/{uid}): Successfully restored 250.2 PRC for USER002 during testing
✅ Bulk Restore PRC API (/api/admin/bulk-restore-prc): Works with empty body and specific user_ids
✅ Fix All Membership Types API (/api/admin/fix-membership-types): Currently shows 0 affected users (bug already fixed in DB)

success_rate.backend: 100% (11 passed, 3 skipped - skipped due to test users not found or already fixed)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing USER002 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PRC Balance Reset Bug fix verified. Key test user USER002 (startup plan) now has correct membership_type='vip' and PRC balance was restored. All 6 APIs tested: diagnose, fix-issue with fix_membership_type, prc-affected-users, restore-prc, bulk-restore-prc, fix-membership-types. The login code at line 4586 now protects paid users from PRC reset.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA: Users had subscription_plan='startup/growth/elite' but membership_type='free' due to data mismatch. Original login code only checked membership_type=='free' to reset PRC (line 4581 old: is_free_user = user_membership == "free"). Fix: Now checks BOTH conditions (line 4586: is_free_user = user_membership == "free" and user_plan not in paid_plans). Also added auto-fix during login to correct membership_type.
